package rulefixtures

// scenario for ioutil_readall_still_used: `ioutil.ReadAll` usage when `io.ReadAll` is available (Go 1.16+)
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule605PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario605Positive(records []Rule605PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
